element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Encounter gauge teaches prediction; frequency scales with progression

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early game (Steven grants Demon Summoning Program)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Attitude selection and choice-response system; moon phase affects success
Affects demon recruitment compatibility and plot branching
Risk/reward system with fusion accidents; ability inheritance adds depth
Creates powerful player equipment; alternative power progression
Connects dungeons; encounters continue on overworld
Missions across Tokyo Millennium districts drive narrative

typical_relief_triggers: Fusion of demons into stronger forms
typical_tension_triggers: Moon phase preventing demon communication (full moon)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based combat with exploration segments; tension managed through encounter prediction gauge and negotiation success rate; relief cycles through story progression and demon acquisition

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: District exploration order in Tokyo Millennium appears flexible; players can revisit areas for recruitment optimization

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible; sources note lowered difficulty compared to first SMT; tutorial through Steven's introduction and initial recruitment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Scaling demon strength requires strategic fusion; moral alignment choices begin affecting available recruits
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminates in Thousand-Year Kingdom preparation; multiple alignment paths create branching difficulty
notable_spikes: Full moon phases (prevents demon negotiation, forcing combat)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game sends Hawk/Aleph on missions across different districts; largest district is Valhalla with gladiator tournament as entry point; Center serves as central mission hub
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Valhalla (starting zone), Center (mission hub), unspecified districts for eradication missions

notable_level_patterns.description: First-person dungeon exploration alternates with top-down overworld map navigation between mission locations
Moral alignment choices throughout game determine which demons can be recruited and which story branches unlock
Full moon phases create temporary gameplay restriction (no demon negotiation), forcing combat encounters or retreat mechanics
